summary: Full-stack e2e testing of Vskolz beauty salon site. All 8 backend pytest cases pass (root, health, booking create valid/invalid x4, list, persistence). Frontend e2e flows verified: landing renders all sections, sticky header + smooth scroll, services tabs (face/massage/body/epilation/brows), price formatting with ru-RU thousand separator + ₽, service arrow pre-fills booking form via CustomEvent, full booking submission succeeds (POST /api/bookings -> 201, success toast 'заявка отправлена' shown), empty-form validation shows toast errors, contacts section shows Yandex map iframe + tel:+79776283437 + whatsapp + instagram links, mobile menu opens and nav links scroll + close menu correctly. Mongo persistence confirmed via direct query.

design_issues.screen: Booking section (left column phone/whatsapp block) and likely any other place using `block link-underline` together
issues: `.link-underline` in index.css declares `display: inline-block` which overrides Tailwind `block` (CSS source order — link-underline wins). Result: phone link and whatsapp link render on the SAME line as '+7 977 628-34-37whatsapp →' instead of stacking. Fix: either add `!important` to Tailwind utility (use `!block`), wrap each anchor in a `<div>`, or scope `.link-underline` to not set display.

action_items: Minor design polish: fix the phone/whatsapp anchors inline-block override so they stack vertically as intended in Booking.jsx (and audit Footer/Contacts for the same `block link-underline` combo).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: When listing bookings, items already include only `id` (no `_id`) — good. Conversion of created_at back to datetime via fromisoformat works because the stored string includes timezone offset from datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat().

server.py: TestBookings persisted documents store created_at as ISO string; consider storing as native BSON datetime for proper Mongo sorting (currently lexicographic ISO string sort luckily matches chronological order because all timestamps share the same UTC format).

Booking.jsx: After successful submit, `done` state remains true forever — subsequent submits within same session will show 'отправлено' on button immediately on render. Consider resetting `done` after a timeout or on form re-fill.
index.css `.link-underline { display: inline-block }` collides with Tailwind `block` utility — see design_issues.
No rate limiting / spam protection on POST /api/bookings — acceptable for MVP but worth a follow-up.
seed_data_creation: Test bookings prefixed TEST_ were created and cleaned up via session fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend exposes /api/, /api/health, /api/bookings (POST 201 / GET list). Notifications are intentionally disabled (empty env). pytest file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is the regression suite. Frontend uses data-testid extensively (see Header.jsx, Services.jsx, Booking.jsx, Contacts.jsx). When testing booking form: select service via [role=option] click after opening [data-testid=booking-select-service]; date popover uses react-day-picker — pick `button[name=day]:not([disabled])`. fromDate=today, so any future enabled day works.
rca of the issue: Phone+WhatsApp single-line rendering RCA: index.css line 101 sets `.link-underline{display:inline-block}` which, due to CSS source ordering (index.css loaded after Tailwind utilities), wins over `.block{display:block}`. Mitigation: use Tailwind's important modifier `!block` on the anchor, wrap each anchor in a block-level `<div>`, or change `.link-underline` to not set `display`.
